_comment: ADOPTER: the product-outcome eval seam (meso ring), mounted as docs/governance/product-evals.json and CODEOWNERS-owned by the product owner. Each product links the discovery hand-off whose success measures (D1) it scores, records the score for every measure, and carries a passing eval RUN AGAINST THE SHIPPING COMMIT with a sealed report. A regression on any measure, or an eval bound to a different commit, blocks the release (scripts/product-eval-check.mjs). The eval RIG — how you actually score a measure — is yours to build; the gate enforces that a release cannot claim product-green without a fresh, discovery-linked, sealed eval. An ABSENT file is OK (not every repo is product-bearing); a PRESENT file binds every product it lists.

success_measures.statement: ADOPT: the success measure copied from the hand-off (D1)
